statusLegend.LIVE: merged and demonstrated runtime behavior within explicit platform, entitlement, and fidelity limits
statusLegend.PARTIAL: merged bounded behavior with explicit limitations or manual-only lanes
statusLegend.PLANNED: accepted direction without merged runtime authority in this matrix
statusLegend.BLOCKED: not admitted, unavailable, or intentionally disabled
